name: claudedoctor
description: Evidence-first diagnostics for Claude Code credentials, client source, network policy, and configuration hygiene.

scripts.test: pnpm build && node --test packages/core/test/*.test.mjs packages/cli/test/*.test.mjs packages/web/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.validate: pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm pack:check
